title: M&CO Legal Expands DIFC and ADGM Disputes Team with Strategic International Hires
description: M&CO Legal has strengthened its International Arbitration and Disputes practice with the appointment of Tonderai Nyandoro as Legal Director – International Arbitration,Nyandoro joins the Firm from Clyde & Co, where he served as Legal Director. He is a highly regarded disputes practitioner with extensive experience across international arbitration, complex commercial litigation, and proceedings in support of arbitration, having appeared before the High Court of England & Wales, the DI
